facts.text: Fact-Factory is an offline knowledge base of atomic facts for AI agents to query before deep code or database exploration.
Source code lives in src/fact_factory/ with four packages: domain, infrastructure, reranking, and cli.
Business logic belongs in domain/ (models, ports, services) and must not import Typer, sqlite3, or httpx directly.
Infrastructure adapters in infrastructure/ implement SQLite persistence, Ollama embeddings, instance discovery, and config loading.
The CLI in cli/ only parses arguments and delegates to domain services; it must not contain business rules.
build_context() in app.py is the composition root that wires repositories, Ollama client, and domain services for each command.
The fact CLI command is registered in pyproject.toml as fact_factory.cli.main:app under [project.scripts].
Dependencies and execution use uv exclusively; requires-python is >= 3.13 in pyproject.toml.
Install the CLI globally with: uv tool install -e . (places fact on PATH, typically ~/.local/bin/fact).
Each instance is a .fact-factory/ directory in a project, containing facts.db (SQLite) and config.json.
fact create makes .fact-factory/ in the current directory and fails with InstanceAlreadyExistsError if it already exists.
Instance discovery in infrastructure/discovery.py walks up from cwd to $HOME seeking .fact-factory/; fallback is ~/.fact-factory/.
Default config.json values: embedding_model embeddinggemma:latest, ollama_base_url http://localhost:11434, top_k 10, min_relevance_score 0.55, page_size 20.
Facts table columns: id (UUID), text, embedding (float32 BLOB), confidence, tags (JSON array), created_at (ISO timestamp), optional deleted_at for soft-delete.
Embeddings are generated via Ollama POST /api/embeddings at fact creation and stored in SQLite; run fact reindex after changing embedding_model in config.json.
Gaps table stores unanswered questions with id, question, created_at, optional resolved_at, optional resolved_fact_id, and optional deleted_at for soft-delete.
query_logs records every fact query with query_text, created_at, result_type (fact or gap), and result_ids (JSON array).

fact query relevance levels from score: >=0.85 maximum, >=0.75 high, >=0.65 good, >=0.55 low, <0.55 none (gap). Each match JSON has score (numeric) and relevance (qualitative). Confidence in the answer is for the consumer; the embedding only reports relevance.
HybridReranker in reranking/hybrid.py scores facts as cosine_similarity + keyword_boost (max 0.15) with EN/PT stopwords.
Vector search v1 loads all embeddings into memory and computes cosine similarity with NumPy; no ANN index yet.
Repository contracts are Protocol classes in domain/ports.py (FactRepository, GapRepository, QueryLogRepository, etc.).
SQLite implementation is in infrastructure/sqlite/repositories.py; schema DDL is in infrastructure/sqlite/schema.py.
Ollama client is OllamaEmbeddingClient in infrastructure/ollama/client.py; failures raise EmbeddingError with actionable messages.
Commands add, query, search, list, remove, reindex, clear, stats, and all gap subcommands output JSON to stdout by default. fact clear permanently deletes all data after interactive confirmation.
Pass --text to add, query, search, list, remove, reindex, clear, stats, or gap commands for human-readable Rich table output.
JSON errors print to stderr as {"error": "message"} with exit code 1; success JSON prints to stdout.
fact add accepts one or more positional fact texts plus optional --confidence (0-1, default 1.0) and --tags (comma-separated, applied to all).
fact remove soft-deletes a fact by UUID (sets deleted_at); use --force for permanent deletion. Soft-delete hides the fact from queries but keeps resolved_fact_id on referencing gaps.
fact gap resolve creates a new fact and marks the gap resolved; fact gap remove soft-deletes open gaps (--force for permanent deletion) and does not work on resolved gaps.
System strings (CLI help, errors, README) are English; fact text and queries may be English or Portuguese. fact export is not implemented.
